zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Normanville於1115年出生在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆時，他的父親Ralph Normanville22歲，母親Emma25歲。他和Emma De Rutland至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1177年在英國盧特藍德艾平加姆享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Normanville于1115年出生在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾平加姆时，他的父亲Ralph Normanville22岁，母亲Emma25岁。他和Emma De Rutland至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1177年在英国盧特藍德艾平加姆享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Normanville was born in 1115, in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Normanville, was 22 and his mother, Emma, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Emma De Rutland. He died in 1177, in Empingham, Rutland, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Normanville est né en 1115, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Normanville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Emma, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Emma De Rutland. Il est décédé en 1177, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Normanville 1115 in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Normanville 22 und seine Mutter Emma 25. Er hatte mit Emma De Rutland mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1177 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Empingham, Rutland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Normanville è nato il nel 1115 nel Empingham, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Normanville, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Emma, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Emma De Rutland. Morì nel 1177, nel Empingham, Rutland, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Normanvilleが1115年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエンパンガムで生まれた時，父Ralph Normanvilleは22歳，母Emmaは25歳であった。彼はEmma De Rutlandとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1177年にイギリスルトランドエンパンガムで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Normanville(이)가 1115년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Normanville(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Emma De Rutland(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 영국 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Normanville nasceu em 1115, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Normanville, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Emma, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Emma De Rutland. Ele faleceu em 1177, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Normanville родился в 1115 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Normanville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Emma, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Emma De Rutland. Он умер в 1177 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Normanville nació en 1115, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Normanville, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Emma, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Emma De Rutland. Murió en 1177, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
